'''longadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinosic|arabinosic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinosic|arabinosic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| longadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:longadhithi|longadhithi]] || [[word:longadhiji|longadhiji]] || [[word:longadhishi|longadhishi]] || [[word:longadhiki|longadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:longadhuthuthu|longadhuthuthu]] || [[word:longadhujuju|longadhujuju]] || [[word:longadhushushu|longadhushushu]] || [[word:longadhukuku|longadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:longadhuthu|longadhuthu]] || [[word:longadhuju|longadhuju]] || [[word:longadhushu|longadhushu]] || [[word:longadhuku|longadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:longadhufthuf|longadhufthuf]] || [[word:longadhufjuf|longadhufjuf]] || [[word:longadhufshuf|longadhufshuf]] || [[word:longadhufkuf|longadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:longadhethe|longadhethe]] || [[word:longadheje|longadheje]] || [[word:longadheshe|longadheshe]] || [[word:longadheke|longadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:longadhothotho|longadhothotho]] || [[word:longadhojojo|longadhojojo]] || [[word:longadhoshosho|longadhoshosho]] || [[word:longadhokoko|longadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:longadhotho|longadhotho]] || [[word:longadhojo|longadhojo]] || [[word:longadhosho|longadhosho]] || [[word:longadhoko|longadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:longadhofthof|longadhofthof]] || [[word:longadhofjof|longadhofjof]] || [[word:longadhofshof|longadhofshof]] || [[word:longadhofkof|longadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfthĂŻf|longadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfjĂŻf|longadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfshĂŻf|longadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfkĂŻf|longadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|longadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|longadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|longadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|longadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfthĂŻf|longadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfjĂŻf|longadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfshĂŻf|longadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfkĂŻf|longadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfthĂŻf|longadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfjĂŻf|longadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfshĂŻf|longadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:longadhĂŻfkĂŻf|longadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:longadhĂŠthĂŠ|longadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:longadhĂŠjĂŠ|longadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:longadhĂŠshĂŠ|longadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:longadhĂŠkĂŠ|longadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:longadhathatha|longadhathatha]] || [[word:longadhajaja|longadhajaja]] || [[word:longadhashasha|longadhashasha]] || [[word:longadhakaka|longadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:longadhatha|longadhatha]] || [[word:longadhaja|longadhaja]] || [[word:longadhasha|longadhasha]] || [[word:longadhaka|longadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:longadhafthaf|longadhafthaf]] || [[word:longadhafjaf|longadhafjaf]] || [[word:longadhafshaf|longadhafshaf]] || [[word:longadhafkaf|longadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:longadhasha|longadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:longadhshĂ«sha|longadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longadhrosha|longadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longadhmusha|longadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:longadhyasha|longadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongadhnkshĂ«sha|golongadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongadhnkrosha|golongadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongadhnkmusha|golongadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongadhnkyasha|golongadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:longangadhasha|longangadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longangadhshĂ«sha|longangadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longangadhrosha|longangadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longangadhmusha|longangadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longangadhyasha|longangadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongangadhnkshĂ«sha|golongangadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongangadhnkrosha|golongangadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongangadhnkmusha|golongangadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongangadhnkyasha|golongangadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lengĂŠdhasha|lengĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lengĂŠdhshĂ«sha|lengĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lengĂŠdhrosha|lengĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lengĂŠdhmusha|lengĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lengĂŠdhyasha|lengĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golengĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|golengĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golengĂŠdhnkrosha|golengĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golengĂŠdhnkmusha|golengĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golengĂŠdhnkyasha|golengĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:longfadhasha|longfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:longfadhshĂ«sha|longfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:longfadhrosha|longfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:longfadhmusha|longfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:longfadhyasha|longfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golongfadhnkshĂ«sha|golongfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golongfadhnkrosha|golongfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golongfadhnkmusha|golongfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golongfadhnkyasha|golongfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
